document_api_meta.title: Search Tap Affiliate Orders
document_api_meta.env_desc: TAP can use this API to retrieve a list of affiliate orders and track the affiliate conversions.

request_header_param.name: x-tts-access-token
request_header_param.desc: The partner access_token value from [Get Access Token](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3292b0f40314a92d75#Get%20Access%20Token%20API), when user_type = 3. Follow this [guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3978f4c20311b8b555) to get partner access_token.

request_query_param.name: app_key
request_query_param.desc: Every single app will have a unique key. Please use the specific key assigned to your app.

request_query_param.name: sign
request_query_param.desc: Signature generated by gen algorithm. When you send API requests to TTS, you must sign them so that TTS can identify the senders.

request_query_param.name: timestamp
request_query_param.desc: Unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00). This timestamp is used across all API requests. Developers can use this convert to local time.

request_query_param.name: page_size
request_query_param.desc: The default is 20, it must be positive integer, the range is 1-100

request_query_param.name: category_asset_cipher
request_query_param.desc: The partner identifier used in API requests. Retrieve this value by using the [Get Authorized Category Assets API](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/666012dd609d4402cc3be995).

request_body_param.name: create_time_ge
request_body_param.desc:
Filter orders to show only those that are created on or after the specified date and time. Unix timestamp.
Please note that we only support 3 months' data at maximum for each single request.
Note:
`create_time_ge` and `create_time_lt` together constitute the creation time filter condition.
`create_time_ge` and `create_time_lt` must be provided together. If both are not specified, data from the last three months will be queried by default.

request_body_param.name: create_time_lt
request_body_param.desc:
Filter orders to show only those that are created before the specified date and time. Unix timestamp.
Refer to notes in `create_time_ge` for more usage information.

request_body_param.name: campaign_id
request_body_param.desc: Filter orders by a TAP campaign using its identifier.

response_param.name: code
response_param.desc: The success or failure status code returned in API response.

response_param.name: message
response_param.desc: The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message.

response_param.name: ^^create_time
response_param.desc: Time and date of order created, UTC+0 timing

response_param.name: ^^delivery_time
response_param.desc: Time and date order delivered, UTC+0 timing

response_param.name: ^^settle_status
response_param.desc:
Settlement Status of the order.
Possible values:
1. "CUSTOMER UNPAID",  customer hasn't paid for the orders.
2. "PENDING", customers can still return or get a refund for this order. The earnings shown are estimates and waiting for settlement.
3. "SETTLED", your earnings have already settled to your account
4. "INELIGIBLE", The order has been returned/refunded/canceled by the buyer, and no commission will be settled.
5. "FROZEN", Possible fraud has been detected regarding the order. The commission will be unfrozen after the fraud is resolved.

response_param.name: ^^^amount
response_param.desc: Price amount for product, such as USD 1000

response_param.name: ^^content_type
response_param.desc:
The content format of the creator content through which the order was created.
Possible values:
- SHOP
- VIDEO
- LIVE
- PRE_LIVE
- PROMOTION_PAGE
- LINKSHARE

response_param.name: ^^creator_shop_ads_commission_rate
response_param.desc: Between TAP & creator percentage shop ads commission

response_param.name: ^^partner_shop_ads_commission_rate
response_param.desc: Between TAP & seller percentage shop ads commission

response_param.name: ^^partner_tap_bonus_commission_rate
response_param.desc: The additional commission rate TikTok Shop offers to affiliate partners for driving product sales in specific campaigns

response_param.name: ^^creator_tap_bonus_commission_rate
response_param.desc: The commission reward rate affiliate partners allocate to creators

response_param.name: ^^estimated_commission_base
response_param.desc: The estimated commission base is the item price multiplied by the number of items ordered at the time the order is created.

response_param.name: ^^^amount
response_param.desc: Price amount for product, such as Rp 1000

response_param.name: ^^estimated_creator_standard_commission
response_param.desc: Estimated TAP commission x creator commission rate

response_param.name: ^^^amount
response_param.desc: Price amount for product, such as Rp 1000

response_param.name: ^^estimated_partner_standard_commission
response_param.desc: Estimated commission base x TAP commission rate

response_param.name: ^^^amount
response_param.desc: Price amount for product, such as Rp 1000

response_param.name: ^^estimated_creator_shop_ads_commission
response_param.desc: Estimated commission base x creator shop ads commission rate

response_param.name: ^^estimated_partner_shop_ads_commission
response_param.desc: Estimated commission base x partner shop ads commission rate

response_param.name: ^^^amount
response_param.desc: Price amount for product, such as Rp 1000

response_param.name: ^^^amount
response_param.desc: Price amount for product, such as Rp 1000

response_param.name: ^^estimated_partner_isr
response_param.desc: Estimated ISR tax amount for Mexico partner

response_param.name: ^^estimated_partner_iva
response_param.desc: Estimated IVA tax amount for Mexico partner

response_param.name: ^^actual_commission_base
response_param.desc: The actual commission base is the item price multiplied by the number of items ordered minus returns at the time the order is completed.

response_param.name: ^^^amount
response_param.desc: Price amount for product, such as Rp 1000

response_param.name: ^^actual_creator_standard_commission
response_param.desc: Actual TAP commission x creator commission rate

response_param.name: ^^^amount
response_param.desc: Price amount for product, such as Rp 1000

response_param.name: ^^actual_partner_standard_commission
response_param.desc: Actual commission base x TAP commission rate

response_param.name: ^^^amount
response_param.desc: Price amount for product, such as Rp 1000

response_param.name: ^^actual_creator_shop_ads_commission
response_param.desc: actual commission base x creator shop ads commission rate

response_param.name: ^^actual_partner_shop_ads_commission
response_param.desc: actual commission base x partner shop ads commission rate

response_param.name: ^^actual_partner_isr
response_param.desc: Actual ISR tax amount for Mexico partner

response_param.name: ^^actual_partner_iva
response_param.desc: actual IVA tax amount for Mexico partner

response_param.name: ^^^amount
response_param.desc: The actual fee affiliate partners earn from commission rewards

response_param.name: ^^^amount
response_param.desc: The actual fee creators receive from affiliate partners through commission rewards

response_param.name: ^^fully_return
response_param.desc: Return “Yes” when this sku is fully returned/refunded. No commission given when full return/refund

response_param.name: ^^settlement_time
response_param.desc: Time and date of order commission settled. UTC+0 Timing

response_param.name: ^^last_update_time
response_param.desc: The time when the record was last updated.

response_param.name: ^next_page_token
response_param.desc: Cursor used for searching for more information

response_param.name: ^total_count
response_param.desc: The total number of sku orders

error_code_list.msg: Internal error. Please try again. If the issue persists after multiple attempts, please contact platform support.

sample_code.label: Go
sample_code.value:
// For more details about the SDK, refer to the documentation:
// https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/67c83e0799a75104986ae498
func affiliatePartner202603SearchTapAffiliateOrdersPost() {
    configuration := apis.NewConfiguration()
    configuration.AddAppInfo(appKey, appSecret)
    apiClient := apis.NewAPIClient(configuration)
    request := apiClient.AffiliatePartnerV202603API.AffiliatePartner202603OrdersSearchPost(context.Background())
    request = request.XTtsAccessToken("your access token")
    request = request.ContentType("application/json")
    request = request.PageToken("6AsPQsUMvH3RkchNUPPh22NROHkE0D8pmq/N5M1kHYcZmtRyv9aVrNv65W7Q6tFA+7D1ud64MPNz5OaT")
    request = request.PageSize(20)
    request = request.CategoryAssetCipher("GCP_XF90igAAAABh00qsWgtvOiGFNqyubMt3")
    affiliatePartner202603SearchTapAffiliateOrdersRequestBody := affiliatePartner_v202603.NewAffiliatePartner202603SearchTapAffiliateOrdersRequestBody()
    affiliatePartner202603SearchTapAffiliateOrdersRequestBody.SetCreateTimeGe(1623812664)
    affiliatePartner202603SearchTapAffiliateOrdersRequestBody.SetCreateTimeLt(1623812664)
    affiliatePartner202603SearchTapAffiliateOrdersRequestBody.SetCampaignId("7324371012170024705")
    request = request.AffiliatePartner202603SearchTapAffiliateOrdersRequestBody(*affiliatePartner202603SearchTapAffiliateOrdersRequestBody)
    resp, httpResp, err := request.Execute()
    if err != nil || httpResp.StatusCode != 200 {
        fmt.Printf("productsRequest err:%v resbody:%s", err, httpResp.Body)
        return
    }
    if resp == nil {
        fmt.Printf("response is nil")
        return
    }
    if resp.GetCode()!= 0 {
        fmt.Printf("response business is error, errorCode:%d errorMessage:%s", resp.GetCode(), resp.GetMessage())
        return
    }
    respDataJson, _ := json.MarshalIndent(resp.GetData(), "", "  ")
    fmt.Println("response data:", string(respDataJson))
    return
}

scope_list.package_description: The application will be able to access a TikTok Shop Affiliate Partner (TAP) campaign information, including view campaign list and details and campaign product list and details.
scope_list.auth_info: The application will be able to access your TikTok Shop Affiliate Partner (TAP) campaign information, including your contact information, campaign list and details, and campaign product list and details.
